summary: Iteration 19 testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (1 skipped - admin stats endpoint doesn't exist). Frontend UI tests verified: Admin panel restructuring with Βαθμολογία and Γκαλερί moved inside team/academy drill-downs. Sidebar has grouped sections (ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ, ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ, ΚΑΤΑΣΤΗΜΑ, ΡΥΘΜΙΣΕΙΣ) with NO standalone Γκαλερί or Βαθμολογία items. Teams drill-down has 5 sub-tabs (Ρόστερ, Πρόγραμμα, Staff, Βαθμολογία, Γκαλερί). Academy drill-down has 2 sub-tabs (Παίκτες, Γκαλερί). Gallery API supports team_id and academy_group_id filtering. Design shows good contrast with white text on dark background.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing data: 1 team (LEFTERIA FC - Α' ΟΜΑΔΑ) with 20 players, 3 academy groups (U12, U7, U9), 11 standings entries, 1 venue (ΓΗΠΕΔΟ ΑΕΤΟΥ).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested admin CMS restructuring with Βαθμολογία and Γκαλερί moved inside drill-downs. Key changes verified: 1) Sidebar has grouped sections (ΣΥΛΛΟΓΟΣ, ΑΚΑΔΗΜΙΑ, ΚΑΤΑΣΤΗΜΑ, ΡΥΘΜΙΣΕΙΣ) with NO standalone Γκαλερί or Βαθμολογία. 2) Teams drill-down has 5 sub-tabs: Ρόστερ (20), Πρόγραμμα (50), Staff (0), Βαθμολογία (11), Γκαλερί (0). 3) Academy drill-down has 2 sub-tabs: Παίκτες, Γκαλερί. 4) Gallery API supports team_id and academy_group_id filtering. 5) POST /api/admin/gallery with team_id/academy_group_id creates filtered gallery items. Design has good contrast with white text on dark background, large numbers on stat cards.
